backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all backend types (UserProfile, QuotationRequest, Project, Review, ChatMessage, AdminInvitationEntry) and persistent state maps for user profiles, quotations, projects, reviews, chat messages, admin users, company logo, and office location with ID generation and basic CRUD operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented mobile app-like features including bottom navigation, swipeable page transitions, pull-to-refresh, touch-friendly UI components, and their associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing React Query hooks, pages with mobile-optimized UI patterns (swipe navigation, pull-to-refresh, skeleton loading), admin interfaces, and utility functions for blob storage and chat management.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes defining colors for background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, borders, and sidebar components using oklch color space.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag and root div mounting the app from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application router using TanStack Router defining all routes (home, services, gallery, testimonials, quotations, admin pages) with Layout wrapper, ProfileSetup component, and Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Protected route component that verifies user authentication and admin permissions, displaying loading states or access denied UI with navigation options if unauthorized.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar with five tabs (Home, Services, Gallery, Reviews, Chat) using haptic feedback, active state highlighting, and 44px minimum touch targets for mobile-optimized navigation.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheet.tsx: A modal bottom sheet component that slides up from the bottom with backdrop, optional title, close button, and scrollable content area. Manages body scroll lock when open.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheetSelec: A custom select input that opens a bottom sheet with selectable options, showing checkmarks for selected values and triggering haptic feedback on selection.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: A full-screen chat widget with profile setup (name/email), message history display, and message sending functionality using backend mutations and local storage for user data.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout with sticky header (logo, login button), main content area, bottom navigation for customer pages, chat widget, and footer with service links and company info.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button that toggles between login/logout states using Internet Identity, with loading states and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/NegotiationHisto: Displays a scrollable chat-like history of negotiation messages between customer and admin with avatars, timestamps, and message bubbles.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog that prompts authenticated users without profiles to enter their name, email, and mobile number, preventing dismissal until completed.
frontend/src/components/PullToRefreshCon: A container component that implements pull-to-refresh functionality with touch event handling, visual feedback indicator, and smooth animations.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: Provides loading skeleton placeholders for different card variants (project, review, service, quotation) with shimmer animation effects.
frontend/src/components/SwipeContainer.t: A React component that wraps children with touch swipe gesture support, applying a horizontal translation transform during swipe interactions using the useSwipeNavigation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance with authentication, creating actors based on Internet Identity state and initializing access control with an admin token from URL parameters. Invalidates and refetches dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Provides a query hook to check if the current caller has admin privileges by calling the backend actor's isCallerAdmin method.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Provides a mutation hook to verify admin email and password credentials by hashing the password with SHA-256 and calling the backend's verifyAuthentication method.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminInvitations.t: Provides hooks to fetch all admin invitations and invite new admin users with SHA-256 hashed passwords, invalidating the invitation cache on successful mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useBiometricAuth.ts: Provides mutation hooks for biometric login and registration using WebAuthn, checking device support and handling credential creation/verification with the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useChat.ts: Provides hooks for chat functionality including sending messages, fetching all chat messages, owner replies, and retrieving customer chat history with automatic query invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useCompanyLogo.ts: Provides query and mutation hooks to get and set the company logo (ExternalBlob), invalidating the logo cache after successful updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useDelivery.ts: Provides a mutation hook to calculate delivery fees based on distance by calling the backend actor's calculateDeliveryFee method.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options for idle handling and derivation origins.
frontend/src/hooks/useNegotiation.ts: Provides a mutation hook to respond to quotation negotiations with messages, invalidating quotation queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfficeLocation.ts: Provides query and mutation hooks to get and set the office location, invalidating the location cache after successful updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjects.ts: Provides hooks for CRUD operations on projects including fetching all projects, filtering by category, and adding/editing/deleting projects with automatic query cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/usePullToRefresh.ts: Implements pull-to-refresh gesture handling with touch events, tracking pull distance and triggering a refresh callback when the threshold is exceeded.
Provides a mutation hook to handle quotation responses with status updates and optional messages, invalidating quotation queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotations.ts: React Query hooks for managing quotation requests including fetching all/user quotations, creating requests, adding details, and approving quotations with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationStatistic: Provides a query hook to fetch quotation statistics (pending, accepted, rejected, negotiating counts) with automatic 30-second refetch intervals for real-time updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useReviews.ts: React Query hooks for managing customer reviews including fetching all reviews, filtering by rating, and adding new reviews with backend actor integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeNavigation.ts: Custom hook implementing touch-based swipe navigation between pages (home, services, gallery, testimonials) with configurable threshold and scroll prevention.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and saving user profile data with loading state management and query cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom print-industry-inspired color scheme (cyan/navy), dark mode support, and utility classes for mobile app features like shimmer effects and safe areas.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: Utility class for handling blob storage URLs with methods to create blobs from URLs or bytes, track upload progress, and retrieve blob data.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider context wrapping the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page component showcasing Nellore Print Hub's services, benefits (expert design, modern technology, customer focus), and company values with hero section and feature cards.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Admin-only dashboard page protected by AdminGuard that displays quotation statistics in four stat cards (pending, accepted, rejected, negotiating) with icons and color coding. Uses useQuotationStatistics hook to fetch and display total counts and quick stats summary.
Admin login page with email/password authentication and optional biometric (WebAuthn) login support. Redirects to admin dashboard on successful authentication.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminUserManage: Admin user management interface for inviting new admin partners with email/password credentials. Displays table of existing admin invitations with status badges and timestamps.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ChatManagementP: Chat management dashboard for admins to view customer messages grouped by email and send replies. Features expandable customer conversations with reply functionality.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LogoManagementP: Logo management interface for uploading and updating company logo with image preview, file validation (5MB limit), and upload progress tracking using ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectManageme: Project management CRUD interface for adding, editing, and deleting projects with image uploads, categorization by ServiceType, and upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/admin/QuotationManage: Admin page for managing quotation requests with functionality to add pricing details, approve quotations, and respond to customer negotiations through dialog forms and tables.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryInfoPage.tsx: Delivery information page with service area details (35km radius) and an interactive calculator to compute delivery fees based on distance input.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with hero section, feature cards (quality, speed, design, pricing), and call-to-action buttons for requesting quotes and viewing the gallery. Includes pull-to-refresh and swipe navigation functionality.
frontend/src/pages/MyQuotationsPage.tsx: Displays a list of user's quotation requests with status badges, project details, and action buttons. Shows office location for accepted quotations and provides navigation to response pages.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectGalleryPage.ts: Portfolio page displaying completed projects in a filterable grid by service category (digital, banner, offset, design). Includes pull-to-refresh and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationConfirmation: Success page shown after quotation submission, displaying the request ID and explaining the next steps in the quotation approval and notification process.
Form page for submitting new quotation requests with fields for service type, deadline, project details, mobile number, and email. Includes validation and haptic feedback.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationResponsePage: Page for authenticated users to view and respond to their quotations with actions to accept, reject, or negotiate, including a negotiation history dialog. Displays login prompt for unauthenticated users and uses hooks for quotation data and response mutations.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Static page displaying four service categories (Digital Printing, Flex & Banner, Offset Printing, Creative Design) with descriptions, features, and icons. Includes pull-to-refresh and swipe container wrappers with a CTA button to request quotations.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitReviewPage.tsx: Form page for submitting customer reviews with fields for name, rating (1-5 stars), project type, review text, and optional image upload with progress tracking. Handles image preview, validation, and uses ExternalBlob for image storage before submitting via mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Page displaying customer reviews with a sticky rating filter (all/5/4/3/2/1 stars) and pull-to-refresh functionality. Shows review cards with star ratings, customer names, project types, and optional images in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/utils/haptics.ts: Utility module providing haptic feedback functions (tap, success, error, select) using the browser's Vibration API with support detection.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: URL parameter parsing utilities supporting both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence for parameters like admin tokens.
frontend/src/utils/webauthn.ts: WebAuthn utility functions for biometric authentication including registration, authentication, support checking, and ArrayBuffer/Base64 conversion helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, extended theme properties, typography/container plugins, and custom animations for the UI components.
project_state.json: Project state document describing Nellore Print Hub's architecture including manual quotation workflow, multi-channel notifications, role-based access, payment integration, and existing features list.
